title: Ambient Agent Mode
summary: Persistent background awareness: system health + cron synthesis + cross-domain trend detection. Implemented as ambient_collect.sh + ambient-agent skill + synthesis cron

title: Skill Trace Optimization
summary: Improve skills from real session trace data. Heuristic + DSPy-powered analysis. Cron at 03:30 daily

title: Structured Feedback Loop for Evolution Pipeline
summary: evolution_feedback.py: 1-5 rating after merges, priority adjustments +/-20-30%, monthly surface

title: DSPy Integration for Skill Optimization
summary: DSPy v3.2.1 at /tmp/dspy_venv. ChainOfThought signatures for trace analysis + patch generation

title: Multi-Agent Routing via Profiles
summary: default + family + research profiles with distinct SOUL.md personas. Channel routing needs per-profile bot tokens

title: Shared Proposal Queue (Pipeline Bridge)
summary: proposals.jsonl bridge between live sessions and evolution pipeline. Prevents duplicate work + rejected concepts

title: Devyn Workflow Improvements
summary: Auto-scrape Instagram/TikTok followers, dedup DB wired into daily email, stale cron removed, 13 accounts tracked

title: Build internal improvement tracker
summary: Replaced upstream GitHub issues with local Obsidian tracker for Prometheus-specific improvements

title: Evolution pipeline stalled: 52 zero-output cycles
summary: Hydra polling wasted ~125K tokens on blocked cycles. Reduced LLM job frequency from 5x/day to 1x/day. Switched all 17 LLM pipeline jobs from DeepSeek to Gemini (provider fix). Created new dream-consolidation cron. Needs user input for: PR feedback (#436/#470), upstream sync merge strategy (695+ commits behind), GitHub label workflow setup.

title: Dreaming stale since June 15 (16 days)
summary: Dreaming cron job was missing entirely — absorbed into agent-self-improvement skill but cron was never recreated. Created new dream-consolidation cron at 0 2 * * * with Gemini provider (bypasses DeepSeek timeout). Will run tonight at 02:00 to process 16 days of backlogged sessions.

title: DeepSeek API timeout epidemic — all cron sessions failing
summary: 100% of cron sessions failed with DeepSeek ReadError/Broken pipe/APIConnectionError for 30+ days. Switched all 17 LLM-based cron jobs from default (deepseek-v4-flash) to explicit model override: gemini-2.5-flash (provider: gemini). Covers: evolution pipeline (7 jobs), dreaming (new), ambient-synthesis, skill-trace-optimizer, weekly digest/audit, monthly report, FutureTools scanner, Trevor report, Hestia digest.

title: Post-patch verification audit — all clear
summary: Audited all automated pipelines that write files. GitHub CLI-based pipelines (issues, PRs, introspection) already verify with list-after-create. Skill-trace-optimizer was the only pure-file-write pipeline — already fixed Jun 29 with read-back verification. No additional fixes needed.

title: NEEDS USER: Feedback backlog (PR #436, #470 pending 52 days)
summary: Two evolution pipeline PRs awaiting your rating: mono-tool spiral guard (PR #436) and pipeline token unbinding (PR #470). Both need a 1-5 rating from you to continue. Blocking the entire analysis pipeline.

title: NEEDS USER: Upstream sync drift (695+ commits behind)
summary: Fork is 695 commits behind upstream Lexus2016/hermes-agent-evolution. No upstream remote configured. Needs your decision on merge strategy: rebase vs merge vs start fresh? Blocking upstream-sync from making progress.

title: NEEDS USER: GitHub PR label workflow + check-attribution
summary: PR labels never auto-applied (blocks integration gate). PR #597 unlabeled. Bot email not whitelisted for checks (blocks all PR merging). Needs GitHub repo settings access or GH token with appropriate permissions.
